name: icons-general-spinner
title: General Spinner Icons
description: All 1 icons from the General Spinner category.

files.content:
import type { FC } from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { type IconProps, type SvgProps, sizeMap } from '../../types';

export type LoaderProps = IconProps;

const LoaderLight: FC<SvgProps> = ({
  size,
  className,
  title,
  role,
  'aria-label': ariaLabel,
  'aria-hidden': ariaHidden,
}) => (
  <svg
    width={size}
    height={size}
    viewBox="0 0 16 16"
    fill="none"
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    className={className}
    role={role}
    aria-label={ariaLabel}
    aria-hidden={ariaHidden}
  >
    {title ? <title>{title}</title> : null}
    <rect
      opacity=".93"
      x="2.35"
      y="3.764"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(-45 2.35 3.764)"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".78"
      x="1"
      y="7"
      width="4"
      height="2"
      rx="1"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".69"
      x="5.179"
      y="9.41"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(45 5.179 9.41)"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".62"
      x="7"
      y="11"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".48"
      x="9.41"
      y="10.824"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(-45 9.41 10.824)"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".38"
      x="11"
      y="7"
      width="4"
      height="2"
      rx="1"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".3"
      x="12.238"
      y="2.35"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(45 12.238 2.35)"
      fill="#A8ADBD"
    />
    <rect x="7" y="1" width="2" height="4" rx="1" fill="#A8ADBD" />
  </svg>
);

const LoaderDark: FC<SvgProps> = ({
  size,
  className,
  title,
  role,
  'aria-label': ariaLabel,
  'aria-hidden': ariaHidden,
}) => (
  <svg
    width={size}
    height={size}
    viewBox="0 0 16 16"
    fill="none"
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    className={className}
    role={role}
    aria-label={ariaLabel}
    aria-hidden={ariaHidden}
  >
    {title ? <title>{title}</title> : null}
    <rect
      opacity=".93"
      x="2.35"
      y="3.764"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(-45 2.35 3.764)"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".78"
      x="1"
      y="7"
      width="4"
      height="2"
      rx="1"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".69"
      x="5.179"
      y="9.41"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(45 5.179 9.41)"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".62"
      x="7"
      y="11"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".48"
      x="9.41"
      y="10.824"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(-45 9.41 10.824)"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".38"
      x="11"
      y="7"
      width="4"
      height="2"
      rx="1"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect
      opacity=".3"
      x="12.238"
      y="2.35"
      width="2"
      height="4"
      rx="1"
      transform="rotate(45 12.238 2.35)"
      fill="#6F737A"
    />
    <rect x="7" y="1" width="2" height="4" rx="1" fill="#6F737A" />
  </svg>
);

export const Loader: FC<LoaderProps> = ({
  size = 'md',
  mode = 'light',
  className,
  'aria-label': ariaLabel,
  title,
  ...props
}) => {
  const SvgComponent = mode === 'light' ? LoaderLight : LoaderDark;

  return (
    <SvgComponent
      size={sizeMap[size]}
      className={cn('inline-block flex-shrink-0', className)}
      title={title}
      role={ariaLabel ? 'img' : 'presentation'}
      aria-label={ariaLabel}
      aria-hidden={!ariaLabel}
      {...props}
    />
  );
};
